case_title: MENA FRANCISCO JAVIER VS SPROUSE FILMON R/O OF VEH. et al

docket_entries.description: OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF MAY-15-1996, DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT SPROUSE FILMON R/O OF VEH.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $840.00 AS TO DEFENDANT SPROUSE FILMON R/O OF VEH.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MENA FRANCISCO JAVIER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SPROUSE FILMON R/O OF VEH. BYRD MATHEW DRIVER VEICLE. $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,065.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
